corrections.text: Two cited URLs returned HTTP 403 (bot-blocked) at the time of editorial review and were not preserved in the local source-snapshot archive: JAMA (https://jamanetwork.com/journals/jama/fullarticle/2848972) and the European Heart Journal Supplements DIGIT-HF article (https://academic.oup.com/eurheartjsupp/article/28/Supplement_5/v116/8513560). The JAMA-attributed meta-analysis numbers (HR 0.85 95% CI 0.80–0.90 p<0.001 for the composite endpoint; HR 0.75 95% CI 0.69–0.81 p<0.001 for worsening heart-failure events; 1,852/4,510 vs 2,037/4,503 event counts) are independently corroborated in the European Society of Cardiology press-release snapshot. The Eur Heart J Suppl DIGIT-HF specifics (HR 0.82 95% CI 0.69–0.98 p=0.03) are corroborated in the American College of Cardiology snapshot. Only the provenance archives for those two URLs are incomplete.
